title: Canopy Growth Reports First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
text: Canopy Growth delivered strong top line growth in Q1 FY2026, led by momentum in its Canada adult-use cannabis business where it's gaining share in high-demand categories, and steady performance across its global medical cannabis business. Key highlights include consolidated net revenue of $75M, cannabis net revenue of $52M, adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed to $3M, net loss narrowed 49% year-over-year, and cash and equivalents of $371M. The first quarter of fiscal 2026 showed Canopy Growth significantly outperforming analyst expectations, reaching $72.1 million in revenue compared to analyst expectations of $49.8 million.
